_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn about barriers to and enablers of respectful engagement within and between diverse cultural groups.

_source.w: We learn about barriers to and enablers of respectful engagement within and between diverse cultural groups.
y: Identifying barriers to respectful engagement is the first step in overcoming them.
Understanding what enables positive intercultural relationships helps us create them deliberately.
These skills prepare us to participate constructively in an increasingly diverse world.
eg: We identify barriers to intercultural engagement — language, fear, stereotypes, power imbalances.
We explore enablers of positive engagement — curiosity, empathy, shared experiences, respect.
We analyse a real-world example of successful intercultural collaboration and identify what made it work.
We discuss how media can both help and hinder intercultural understanding.
We explore how education and personal experience can break down intercultural barriers.
We develop practical strategies for fostering respectful engagement in our own school community.
